tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / A) Sync dev-order (folder -> TSV + views)
tasks.detail: EXT workspace prerequisite: sync config/dev-order.tsv and views from current folder/script order.

tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / B) Build aliases + EXT proxy pack (uses TSV master)
tasks.detail: EXT workspace prerequisite: builds aliases + EXT proxy pack directly (no TM loader generation).
tasks.command: H2O_BUILD_TS=$(node -e "process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))") && export H2O_BUILD_TS && export H2O_ALIAS_MODE=symlink && export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_ORDER_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/dev-order.tsv" && export H2O_SERVER_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/../h2o-dev-server" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/common/make-aliases.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ext/make-ext-proxy-pack.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O EXT Prereqs Build Done" && echo "   Copied Server (sibling h2o-dev-server): $H2O_SERVER_DIR" && echo "   Aliases (ON-only): $H2O_SERVER_DIR/alias" && echo "   EXT proxy pack: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/proxy/_paste-pack.ext.txt" && echo "   Dev builds: ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-controls | ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-lean" && echo "   Ops Panel build: ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-ops-panel"

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 Controls Build Extension (unpacked)
tasks.detail: Dev-only extension step: builds build/chrome-ext-dev-controls (popup toggles + live loader).
tasks.command: export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_EXT_OUT_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-controls" && export H2O_EXT_PROXY_PACK_URL="http://127.0.0.1:5500/dev_output/proxy/_paste-pack.ext.txt" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ext/make-chrome-live-extension.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Dev Controls Extension Built" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-controls"

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)
tasks.detail: Lean dev extension step: builds build/chrome-ext-dev-lean (no popup toggles, slightly faster startup).
tasks.command: export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_EXT_DEV_VARIANT=lean && export H2O_EXT_OUT_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-lean" && export H2O_EXT_PROXY_PACK_URL="http://127.0.0.1:5500/dev_output/proxy/_paste-pack.ext.txt" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ext/make-chrome-live-extension.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Lean Dev Loader Extension Built" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-dev-lean"

tasks.label: H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)
tasks.detail: Ops Panel preview step: builds build/chrome-ext-ops-panel (separate extension icon scaffold).
tasks.command: export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_PANEL_OUT_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-ops-panel" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ext/make-chrome-ops-panel-extension.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Ops Panel Preview Extension Built" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/build/chrome-ext-ops-panel"

tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build (one click prerequisite)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick prerequisite: runs Common A then Common B.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / A) Sync dev-order (folder -> TSV + views)
H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / B) Build aliases + EXT proxy pack (uses TSV master)

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / C) ⚡ 🟢 QUICK ✅ RECOMMENDED: Workflow for Dev Controls
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick recommended dev workflow: runs Common C, then DEV A (🟢 Controls).
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 Controls Build Extension (unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / D) ⚡ 🔵 QUICK FAST: Workflow for Lean Dev Loader
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick faster dev workflow: runs Common C, then DEV B (🔵 Lean).
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)

tasks.label: H2O: 4) 🟨 BOTH / A) ⚡ 🟢 QUICK Combined: Build Dev Controls + Ops Panel
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick combined outputs: runs Common C, then DEV A (🟢 Controls) + OPS PANEL A.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 Controls Build Extension (unpacked)
H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: 4) 🟨 BOTH / B) ⚡ 🔵 QUICK FAST: Build Lean Dev Loader + Ops Panel
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick faster combined outputs: runs Common C, then DEV B (🔵 Lean) + OPS PANEL A.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)
H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: DEV / Z) ONE-BUTTON Rebuild Everything (scripts + aliases + proxy + controls + lean)
tasks.detail: One-button daily rebuild: common prereqs + Controls extension + Lean extension.

tasks.label: H2O: 5) 🟪 ARCHIVE / A) ⚡ QUICK Local Archive Snapshot (version changes only)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick local archive: saves version-changed files into h2o-workspace-ext/h2o-source/archive.
tasks.command: node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ops/archive-snapshot.mjs" "${workspaceFolder}" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Local Archive Snapshot Done" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/archive"

tasks.label: H2O: 5) 🟪 ARCHIVE / B) Local Full Archive Snapshot (--all)
tasks.detail: Local archive utility: full snapshot of versioned tracked files into today's archive folder.
tasks.command: node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/ops/archive-snapshot.mjs" "${workspaceFolder}" --all && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Local Full Archive Snapshot Done" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/archive"

tasks.label: H2O: GIT / A) Auto Commit (stage + message + commit)
